headline: Anthropic releases Claude Fable 5 amid routing and efficiency innovations
body: Anthropic is releasing Claude Fable 5, marking a significant update to its flagship model. The release coincides with emerging tools that route Claude Code subagents to cheaper or on-device alternatives, and innovations extending token context windows by 28x before auto-compaction. For healthcare AI deployments, these developments lower operational costs for clinical documentation workflows and EHR integrations while maintaining model capability. Vendors building AI-assisted clinical decision support or prior authorization systems should evaluate whether Fable 5 improves accuracy benchmarks relevant to their use cases, and whether agentic routing strategies reduce infrastructure costs in value-based care settings.
